title: User Authentication System
description: Implement secure user authentication with email/password login, sessions, and password reset
requirements: [ ] Login page with email and password inputs
[ ] Password validation (minimum 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number)
[ ] Password reset flow with email link
[ ] Rate limiting (5 failed attempts per hour)
[ ] Unit tests for all authentication flows
[ ] Integration tests for happy path and error cases
constraints: HTTPS required for all auth endpoints

acceptance_criteria.security: Password reset tokens expire in 1 hour
